Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 265 [birth omens][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[... mul]⸢GAM₃ U₃⸣.[TU ...]

[...] is born [...] the Crook: [...].

r 2'2'

[... mul]MAŠ.MAŠ U₃.⸢TU⸣ [...]

[...] is born [...] the Twins: [...].

r 3'3'

[...] ⸢mul⸣AL.LUL U₃.TU [...]

[...] is born [...] the Crab: [...].

r 4'4'

[*] ⸢KI⸣ MUL 2 <<MUL₂>> ša₂ SAG.DU mulUR.GU.LA U₃.TU x [...]

(If the baby) is born in the region of the 2 stars of the Lion's head: ... [...].

r 5'5'

* KI MUL 4 ša₂ GABA-šu₂ U₃.TU UŠ₂ x [...]

(If) he is born in the region of the 4 stars of its (the Lion's) chest: blood ... [...].

r 6'6'

* KI MUL 2 ša₂ KUN-šu₂ U₃.TU UŠ₂-šu₂ x [...]

(If) he is born in the region of the 2 stars of its loins: his blood ... [...].

r 7'7'

[*] ⸢KI MUL⸣ e-du ša₂ KUN-šu₂ U₃.TU DUMU.MUNUS-MEŠ ⸢U₃⸣.[TU]

(If) he is born in the region of the single star of its tail: [...] daughters will be born.

r 8'8'

* KI mula-ru₆ U₃.TU DUMU-MEŠ ⸢TUKU⸣

(If) he is born in the region of the Eagle: he will acquire sons.

r 9'9'

* KI mulna-at-tul-lu₄ ar₂-ku-u₂ U₃.TU im-man-⸢gar⸣

(If) he is born in the region of the rear Harness: he will find divine acceptance.

(colophon)
r 10'10'

GIM SUMUN-šu₂ SAR-ma ba₃-ru₃ IM mDIN bu₁₂-kur₂ m[...]-x ⸢A⸣ mE₂.KUR—za-kir

Written and checked according to its original. Tablet of Balaṭu, son of [...]-..., descendant of Ekur-zakir.
